objective: Audit AgentOps CI tests and hooks to reduce noisy signals and strengthen explicit validation contracts

tracker_health.reason: bd available; created epic agentops-dtg with five child tasks

done_criteria: All workflow jobs are classified by summary policy and documented in AGENTS/docs or explicitly excluded with rationale
Hook preflight and orphan-hook checks derive coverage from manifests or explicit allowlists
Local gate tests exercise behavior rather than only checking grep/count structure
Advisory warnings remain visible but are explicitly marked non-blocking
Targeted validation commands in the plan pass

test_levels.rationale: Work touches shell validators, workflow policy, hook manifests/tests, and docs. L3 local release validation is final-wave proof because broad local gates can be noisy during policy normalization.
